MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-26-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-26-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS LONDON POLICY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41 BECAUSE THERE IS NO DECLARATION STATING THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED PRIOR TO THIS FILING. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION CONFIRMS THAT THERE WAS NO COMPLIANCE WITH THIS REQUIREMENT. THE DEMURRER IS THEREFORE OFF CALENDAR AND THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO IMMEDIATELY MEET AND CONFER. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE JUNE 23, 2021. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS LONDON POLICY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Certain Underwriters' demurrer to amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. (See Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 430.10(e) [failure to state a cause of action].)

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Continued To Aug-25-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS LONDON POLICY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. The moving party failed to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41 because there is no declaration stating that the parties met and conferred prior to this filing. Plaintiff's opposition confirms that there was no compliance with this requirement. The demurrer is therefore off calendar and the parties are ordered to immediately meet and confer. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due June 23, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
